temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A wide shot reveals a dark, snowy mountain landscape at night. A large, rustic lodge is partially buried in deep snow, with its windows illuminated by harsh, cold light. Two small figures are visible walking on the snow-covered ground in the foreground. (Storyline: This establishing shot sets a mysterious and ominous tone, introducing the primary location of the story.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
(00:02-00:04) A close-up shows a man with a bruised and swollen eye, a cut on his forehead, and a bloody nose. He wears a red corduroy jacket over a plaid shirt. He peeks around a doorframe with a menacing, wide-eyed grin, baring his teeth. (Storyline: This shot introduces a key character, immediately establishing him as a menacing and unhinged individual.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Maniacal, menacing. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful score continues.)
